hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path').join(process.cwd(),'CLAUDE.md');if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('FATAL: CLAUDE.md not found. Cannot proceed.');process.exit(1);}console.log('[GateTest] CLAUDE.md present.');"
cat CLAUDE.md | head -80 && echo '' && echo '=== CLAUDE.md LOADED. ALL RULES ABOVE ARE MANDATORY. ===' && echo ''
hooks.description: GateTest: Force-feed CLAUDE.md content into session context on startup

hooks.command: { [ -d node_modules ] || npm install --no-audit --no-fund --silent; } && { [ -d website/node_modules ] || ( cd website && npm install --no-audit --no-fund --silent ); } && echo '[GateTest] Deps ready.'
hooks.description: GateTest: Install npm deps at root + website/ on cold start. Idempotent — no-op when node_modules exist (~2ms), ~30-60s cold install.

hooks.rewakeMessage: ALWAYS-ON MODE sweep (CLAUDE.md): do not end the turn until these are fixed or escalated to Craig under THE BOSS RULE.
hooks.description: GateTest: Never-idle sweep — runs tests, build, module load, TODO check. Wakes model on red (exit 2). 3-rewake loop-guard in sweep.sh.
